targets.cypherQuery: MATCH (n:Ticket) RETURN n.sourceSystem AS sourceSystem, count(n) AS count ORDER BY count DESC
MATCH (n:Document) RETURN n.sourceSystem AS sourceSystem, count(n) AS count ORDER BY count DESC
MATCH (n:MethodDef) RETURN n.language AS language, count(n) AS count ORDER BY count DESC
MATCH (n:PropertyDef) RETURN n.language AS language, count(n) AS count ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Sync rate per source (items / 5 min) — filtered by $source
Sync errors (per Quartz job, 5 min rate)
429 / Retry-After hits (per host, 5 min rate)
panels.description: host label is the request URI host (e.g. api.atlassian.com, dev.azure.com, api.github.com, api.clickup.com).
